# GUNZIP(1) — Terminal Depths Man Page

## NAME
  gunzip — decompress gzip files

## SYNOPSIS
  gunzip <file.gz>

## DESCRIPTION
Decompresses files compressed with gzip. Equivalent to `gzip -d`.

## EXAMPLES
  gunzip evidence.log.gz
  gzip -d archive.gz

## SEE ALSO
  gzip, tar, zip
